types.name: Morning Priorities
types.agenda: Full org daily kickoff. Review overnight changes, surface top priorities for Joshua, identify tasks agents should auto-handle today.

types.name: Tech Debt Sprint
types.agenda: Elon reviews codebase health: TODOs, build issues, dependency updates, tech debt across all 3 programs. Plan targeted fixes for the week.

types.name: App Store Readiness
types.agenda: Elon reviews Lever app progress toward App Store submission. Build status, missing features, compliance checklist, EAS build health.

types.name: Infrastructure Review
types.agenda: Elon reviews deployment health, Supabase usage, API performance, Vercel build times, error rates. Plan infrastructure improvements.

types.name: Content Calendar Review
types.agenda: Alex reviews content pipeline: podcast episode status, blog schedule, newsletter planning, content gaps. Plan this week's content output.

types.name: Distribution Audit
types.agenda: Alex reviews distribution reach: social media presence, SEO rankings, cross-platform syndication, content not yet distributed. Fix gaps.

types.name: Audience Growth Strategy
types.agenda: Alex reviews audience metrics: newsletter subscribers, podcast listeners, website traffic, social followers. Plan growth tactics.

types.name: Ecosystem Revenue Review
types.agenda: Dave reviews revenue health across ALL programs: Lever app subscription readiness, Builder's Frequency monetization (sponsors, premium), joshlevylabs.com conversion funnel, newsletter growth. Identify revenue blockers and next activation steps.

types.name: Business Development
types.agenda: Dave reviews growth opportunities: potential sponsors for podcast, partnership leads, affiliate/referral programs, premium tier design, pricing strategy. Scout market for revenue-generating partnerships.

types.name: Monetization Pipeline
types.agenda: Dave reviews monetization pipeline: Lever subscription tiers and pricing, podcast sponsorship outreach, newsletter premium content, joshlevylabs.com paid offerings. Prioritize paths to first dollar.

types.name: Weekly Revenue Review
types.agenda: Full org revenue review: subscription metrics, watt purchases, content monetization, trading P&L. How are we tracking toward income goals?

types.name: Ecosystem Sync Audit
types.agenda: Cross-program sync check: are all 3 programs aligned? Content synced between website and Hub? Features matched between website and app? Fix drift.

types.name: Brand Momentum Check
types.agenda: Brand health: content performance trends, audience engagement, competitive positioning, brand consistency across platforms. What's resonating?

types.name: Afternoon Checkpoint
types.agenda: Midday progress review. What got done this morning? Any blockers? Reprioritize if needed. Market midday check.

types.name: Evening Wrap
types.agenda: End-of-day review. What shipped today? What carries over? Market close summary. Preview tomorrow's priorities.

types.name: Midnight Prep
types.agenda: Overnight prep. Queue tasks for overnight agents. Set up tomorrow's agenda. Review ecosystem health before agents run nightly jobs.
